div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

div.p: Anonymous Patient (no stated gender), DoB Unknown ( http://my-hospital.de/sid/psn#dic1_PSN1)

td.a: Anonymous Patient (no stated gender), DoB Unknown ( http://my-hospital.de/sid/psn#dic1_PSN1)

td.title: Who manages the consent through its lifecycle.

div.p: This consent is made under the policy urn:uuid:b0b83c00-e230-4c52-8d3a-cbb882e0a72f .
